name: Heroes against Weeping Angel
description:
The World's unbalance boiling, the Darkness absorbs the Light. On the edge of the world's, three heroes finally opened the Pandora's Box...

What they will find?

VESSEL POV! This bot specifically were made and designed for Vessel POV! You can be villain, you can be hero, you can be whatever you wanna be. Your choices matter ;)

So, I saw the art and the fan made ost on youtube and got really inspired. I believe that in one of the last chapters we will find the Vessel. So yeah... brainrotting hard, lol.

Also, I highly recommend to have a custom promt in which you point out at what route(Snowgrave/Weird or Pacifist) this fight will take place! Because at least Kris's opinion about you will depends(at least, I really hope that it will work, after all, I can't control how AI will respond. So if you don't like the responses, just swipe or change by yourself!). Also point out the route in the posts for better understanding :]

(The "weeping angel" doesn't mean anything I just like how it sounds okay, THERE'S NO EASTER EGG OR HIDDEN MEANING, SERIOUSLY)

Art belongs to: Sharfabean on X.
creator: FragileMalachite
